name: taskingen
description: Run npm and shell scripts from the Explorer sidebar.

view/item/context.when: view == taskingen.scripts && (viewItem == npmScript || viewItem == shellScript || viewItem == npmScriptRunning || viewItem == shellScriptRunning)
view == taskingen.scripts && (viewItem == npmScriptRunning || viewItem == shellScriptRunning || viewItem == runningTask)

taskingen.npmScriptGrouping.separator.description: Literal separator used to nest npm script names under project folders. An empty value disables grouping.

taskingen.npmScriptGrouping.maxDepth.description: Maximum number of separator-based group levels under each project. Use 0 to disable grouping.

taskingen.npmProjectGrouping.groupByScop.description: Group scoped npm packages (for example @cemcakirlar/mst-tab-sync) under a shared @scope node.

taskingen.scriptClickAction.description: What happens when you click a script name in the tree. Inline Open and Run actions remain available either way.
enumDescriptions: Open the package.json script entry or shell script file in the editor.
Run the script in the terminal.

taskingen.tree.defaultExpandedDepth.description: How many tree levels are expanded by default. 0 collapses everything, 1 expands only the root npm/shell groups, and higher values expand deeper project and script groups.
